nodes.summary: Reference documentation cataloguing different knowledge source types (docs, APIs, databases, code) with integration patterns and trust-level guidelines.

nodes.summary: YAML template for configuring knowledge source connections, defining source type, access patterns, credentials, and caching behavior.

nodes.name: mcp-builder manifest
nodes.summary: Skill manifest for the mcp-builder skill, registering triggers for building and evaluating MCP servers.

nodes.name: connections.py
nodes.summary: Lightweight MCP connection library providing abstract MCPConnection base class and concrete implementations for stdio, SSE, and HTTP transports; includes a factory function create_connection.

nodes.name: evaluation.py
nodes.summary: MCP server evaluation harness that runs test questions against an MCP server using Claude, collecting structured summaries, tool feedback, and responses tagged in XML.

nodes.name: mcp-builder SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill documentation for building MCP servers, covering tool definition, transport selection, evaluation workflows, and best practices.
